response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse technologies
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Extensive background in event-driven systems and distributed architectures
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL work in the last 9+ years, critical for this role
Lacks demonstrated experience with industrial protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, IEC 62443) or on-prem/cloud automation platforms
No evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) implementation or industrial cybersecurity compliance
